description: Add Header Layout & Structure settings (14 new settings for Area 1) to sections/header.liquid schema, and Badge Colors & Spacing settings (20 new settings for Area 6) to sections/mega-navigation.liquid schema. Also add Mobile & Polish settings (15 new settings for Area 4) to sections/mega-navigation.liquid. Total: 49 new settings across both files.
steps: STEP 1 - Add 14 Header Layout & Structure settings to sections/header.liquid schema under a new 'Header Layout & Structure' header (insert after existing Phase 2 layout settings). Settings: hp_header_height_desktop (range 60-120 step 5 default 80), hp_header_height_mobile (range 50-80 step 5 default 60), hp_header_vertical_align (select: top/center/bottom, default center), hp_header_bg_opacity (range 0-100 step 5 default 100), hp_header_shadow (select: none/small/medium/large, default none), hp_border_top (checkbox false), hp_border_top_color (color #000000), hp_border_top_width (range 1-5 step 1 default 1), hp_scroll_shrink (range 10-50 step 5 default 20), hp_scroll_bg_change (checkbox false), hp_scroll_bg_color (color #FFFFFF), hp_scroll_shadow (select: none/subtle/medium/strong, default none), hp_nav_alignment (select: left/center/right/space-between, default center), hp_icon_alignment (select: compact/spread, default compact).

STEP 2 - Add CSS variables for the 14 new header settings in the Liquid style block of sections/header.liquid. For hp_header_bg_opacity: output as calc({{ section.settings.hp_header_bg_opacity }} / 100). For hp_scroll_shrink: output as calc({{ section.settings.hp_scroll_shrink }} / 100).

STEP 3 - Update assets/header-premium.css with implementations: (a) Header height desktop/mobile from vars. (b) Vertical alignment (align-items on .header grid). (c) Background opacity. (d) Shadow variants. (e) Border top. (f) Scroll shrink (scale transform on sticky). (g) Scroll background color change. (h) Scroll shadow on stick. (i) Nav alignment. (j) Icon alignment (gap vs space-between).

STEP 4 - Add 20 Badge Colors & Spacing settings to sections/mega-navigation.liquid schema under new headers 'Badge Enhancements' and 'Spacing'. Badge settings: mn_badge_text_color (color #FFFFFF), mn_badge_font_size (range 8-12 step 1 default 9), mn_badge_font_weight (select: 600/700/800, default 700), mn_badge_border_radius (range 0-12 step 1 default 3), mn_badge_padding_h (range 3-10 step 1 default 5), mn_badge_padding_v (range 1-6 step 1 default 2), mn_badge_style (select: filled/outline/gradient, default filled), mn_badge_position (select: after-text/above-text/superscript, default after-text), mn_badge_animation (select: none/pulse/bounce/shine, default none), mn_custom_badge_1_text (text 'LIMITED'), mn_custom_badge_1_color (color #8B5CF6), mn_custom_badge_2_text (text 'TRENDING'), mn_custom_badge_2_color (color #0EA5E9). Spacing settings: mn_nav_bar_height (range 40-70 step 5 default 50), mn_nav_bar_padding_h (range 0-60 step 5 default 0), mn_dropdown_gap (range 0-20 step 2 default 0), mn_promo_card_width (range 180-400 step 20 default 280), mn_promo_card_gap (range 16-60 step 4 default 32), mn_col_gap_h (range 16-48 step 4 default 24), mn_col_link_gap_v (range 2-12 step 1 default 4).

STEP 5 - Add 15 Mobile & Polish settings to sections/mega-navigation.liquid schema under a new 'Mobile & Polish' header. Settings: mn_mobile_header_style (select: default/simplified/centered-logo-only, default default), mn_mobile_menu_style (select: list/grid-icons/cards, default list), mn_mobile_nested_animation (select: slide-right/accordion-expand/fade, default accordion-expand), mn_mobile_drawer_width (range 70-100 step 5 default 85), mn_mobile_drawer_bg (color #FFFFFF), mn_mobile_overlay_color (color #000000), mn_mobile_overlay_opacity (range 10-90 step 10 default 50), mn_mobile_close_style (select: x-icon/arrow-back/text-close, default x-icon), mn_mobile_show_logo (checkbox false), mn_mobile_footer_social (checkbox false), mn_mobile_accordion_speed (range 150-500 step 50 default 300), mn_mobile_swipe_close (checkbox false), mn_mobile_bottom_icon_style (select: outline/filled/minimal, default outline), mn_mobile_bottom_labels (checkbox true), mn_mobile_bottom_active (select: dot/line/color-fill, default dot).
STEP 6 - Add CSS variables for all 35 new mega-navigation settings in the Liquid style block. For mn_mobile_overlay_opacity: output divided by 100.0.

STEP 7 - Update assets/mega-navigation.css with badge enhancements: (a) Badge text color, font-size, weight, radius, padding from vars. (b) Outline style (background transparent, border colored). (c) Gradient style. (d) Badge positions (after-text inline, above-text absolute positioned, superscript vertical-align). (e) Badge animations (pulse keyframes, bounce keyframes, shine shimmer keyframes). (f) Custom badge support.

STEP 8 - Update assets/mega-navigation.css with spacing implementations: (a) Nav bar height from var. (b) Nav bar horizontal padding. (c) Dropdown gap from nav (margin-top on dropdown). (d) Promo card width and gap. (e) Column horizontal gap. (f) Column link vertical gap.

STEP 9 - Update assets/mega-navigation.css with mobile enhancements: (a) Drawer width from var. (b) Drawer background color. (c) Overlay color and opacity from vars. (d) Close button style variants. (e) Accordion animation speed from var. (f) Grid-icons and cards mobile menu layouts.
STEP 10 - Update assets/mega-navigation.js with mobile enhancements: (a) Swipe to close (touch event listeners on drawer). (b) Read accordion speed from CSS var or data attribute for timing.
STEP 11 - Validate all schemas parse correctly and CSS/JS have balanced braces.
acceptance_criteria: header.liquid schema has 14 additional settings in the Header Layout & Structure section
mega-navigation.liquid schema has 35 additional settings (20 badge+spacing + 15 mobile)
All range settings have valid step-aligned defaults
Header height is controlled by CSS variable and changes desktop vs mobile
Badge animations (pulse, bounce, shine) have proper @keyframes defined
Badge outline style renders with transparent background and colored border
Mobile drawer width respects the percentage setting
Mobile overlay uses configurable color and opacity
All JSON schemas parse without errors
CSS and JS files have balanced braces
verification: Run: python3 -c "import json; schema=open('sections/header.liquid').read().split('{% schema %}')[1].split('{% endschema %}')[0]; data=json.loads(schema); settings=[s for s in data['settings'] if s.get('type') != 'header']; print(f'Header settings count: {len(settings)}'); assert len(settings) >= 70, f'Expected >= 70 header settings, got {len(settings)}'"

Run: python3 -c "import json; schema=open('sections/mega-navigation.liquid').read().split('{% schema %}')[1].split('{% endschema %}')[0]; data=json.loads(schema); settings=[s for s in data['settings'] if s.get('type') != 'header']; print(f'Mega-nav settings count: {len(settings)}'); assert len(settings) >= 120, f'Expected >= 120 mega-nav settings, got {len(settings)}'"
Run: python3 -c "css=open('assets/mega-navigation.css').read(); assert css.count('{') == css.count('}'); assert '@keyframes' in css and 'pulse' in css; print('CSS OK + animations found')"
Run: python3 -c "css=open('assets/header-premium.css').read(); assert css.count('{') == css.count('}'); assert 'hp-header-height' in css or 'header-height-desktop' in css; print('Header CSS OK')"
findings: Header settings count: 75 (14 new, above minimum of 70). Mega-nav settings count: 132 (35 new, above minimum of 120). All CSS balanced, JSON schemas valid. Badge animations (pulse, bounce, shine) have @keyframes defined. Swipe-to-close added to JS with touchstart/touchend listeners. All data attributes added to Liquid markup.
